purpose: Auto-loaded (user-invocable: false) skill providing the worker agent's complete progress reporting protocol. Contains: full progress file schema (task_id/dashboard_id/status/started_at/completed_at/summary/assigned_agent/template_version/stage/message/milestones/deviations/logs/files_changed/annotations/prompt_size/shared_context/sibling_reads); 7 fixed stages (reading_context -> planning -> implementing -> testing -> finalizing -> completed/failed); 8 mandatory writes (before-start, after-upstream, on-stage-transition, on-deviation, on-error, on-file-change, on-completion, on-failure); deviation reporting with severity levels CRITICAL/MODERATE/MINOR + common deviations table; upstream dependency 4-step procedure (read-extract-adapt-log); sibling communication rules (MAY read, MUST NOT depend, SHOULD populate shared_context, MUST log every read, MUST NEVER write to another's progress file); partial completion protocol (80%+ done with blocker = completed not failed); PKI annotation schema (gotchas/patterns/conventions per file); structured RETURN FORMAT; log levels (info/warn/error/deviation); 10-rule summary.
gotchas: Workers write the FULL file every update — no read-modify-write; sole-writer model
dashboard_id field MUST match the dashboard directory — server rejects mismatches
files_changed is REQUIRED from `implementing` stage onward — empty at completion is a major quality flag
Timestamps via `date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ` — never hardcode or guess
Use Write tool (not echo/cat) for progress files
Partial completion (80%+) = `completed` with deviation, not `failed` — preserves downstream value
PKI annotations are OPTIONAL but feed the persistent knowledge layer — only annotate files actually read deeply
Sibling reads are optional but MUST be logged; MUST NOT cause hard dependency
patterns: Sole-writer model: full-file overwrite per update
conventions: RETURN FORMAT keys: STATUS:/SUMMARY:/FILES CHANGED:/EXPORTS:/DIVERGENT ACTIONS:/ANNOTATIONS:/WARNINGS:/ERRORS:
